changelog: 0.8.0  Global Roles & permissions catalog (backend) — first global, non-tenant data; /api/roles serves 11 seeded roles with module-visibility profiles
0.7.0  Rich terminal-user profiles — role + capability toggles + per-terminal access; QR when Yard Jockey capable
0.6.2  Home is a project roadmap (built vs planned, progress bar)
0.6.1  Shared theme (aurora-theme.css) from the demo; shell restyled
0.6.0  Unified app shell connecting live screens
0.3.0  Order entry — lookups, create-on-the-fly, duplicate prevention
0.1.0  Admin onboarding + password gate; multi-tenant API foundation
